title: Mangled Script Deployed to the Full
display_title: Mangled Script Deployed to the Full
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Jan 16, 2008 3:00 am A reeeeeaaaaalllllyyy bad translation based off of the russian subs has been posted on that site. http://rapidshare.com/files/84037832/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_You_are_NOT_alone.txt.html Here's a sample Joaquin's Mangled Translation wrote: # 837 01, 01, 37, 16 01, 01, 38, 10 As with the AT-sex? # 838 01, 01, 38, 13 01, 01, 39, 21 Deployed to the full. # 839 01, 01, 39, 21 01, 01, 41, 22 Now it protects him. # 840 01, 01, 47, 08 01, 01, 48, 05 Damn it! # 841 01, 01, 48, 12 01, 01, 49; 14 Here bad! # 842 01, 01, 49, 18 01, 01, 50, 21 Remove me from here! # 843 01, 01, 50, 25 01, 01, 52, 15 My father, true to me! # 844 01, 01, 52, 18 01, 01, 55, 02 The lifting operation, every effort to preserve the life of the pilot. # 845 01, 01, 55, 06 01, 01, 56, 10 Forced inside! # 846 01, 01, 56, 23 01, 01, 57, 16 It is useless. # 847 01, 01, 59, 10 01, 02, 03, 18 If the pilot is lost, AT-field completely disappear ... # 848 01, 02, 03, 25 01, 02, 06, 09 This is a disadvantageous situation.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2008 9:53 am Oh crap, I did the wrong thing when splitting... Uh, I'll just have to put the two reply posts here... *** CtHuLhU Posted: Wed Jan 16, 2008 5:01 am Aww, it cause of my bad adoptation =( But lol autotranslation is lol I think you know that many phrases have remained without changes, especially in the beginning and necessary to use the original English script from last release of TV version or script by LTS =) PS Please open new subs thread! let's discuss all there. PPS Some informed people on this site still can do hightquality translation from Jap >_> Of course, the majority is waiting for DVD or ansub. *** Indigo Arcangel Posted: Wed Jan 16, 2008 6:03 am Someone set us up the bomb We get signal Main screen turn on All your base are belong to us Sorry, couldn't resist

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Jan 16, 2008 11:47 am A sample of where I am right now Dialogue: 0,0:05:42.48,0:05:44.27,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Well, yes, we are. Dialogue: 0,0:05:48.06,0:05:48.88,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Father... Dialogue: 0,0:05:51.50,0:05:54.81,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,By the way, have you received your ID card? Dialogue: 0,0:05:55.43,0:05:56.81,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Oh... yes. Dialogue: 0,0:05:58.59,0:05:59.28,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Here you go. Dialogue: 0,0:05:59.49,0:06:00.66,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Thanks. Dialogue: 0,0:06:02.45,0:06:04.52,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Here, read this. Dialogue: 0,0:06:05.07,0:06:05.83,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,NERV... Uh, why does the subs for the Zero Raws Camrip deserve it's own thread? I thought this would count as camrip related as it's being timed for a camrip. Meh.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Wed Jan 16, 2008 12:15 pm The deviation for two versions of camrips is 23.6 seconds. Upon completion it's esily to adjust timing in Subtilte Workshop. First phrase at 0:00:25.65,0:00:28.82 and 0:00:49.25,0:00:52.42 .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2008 12:18 pm cat42 wrote: Uh, why does the subs for the Zero Raws Camrip deserve it's own thread?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 16, 2008 9:57 pm This dang Ruskie script sounds like a Grunt from Halo wrote it....

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 16, 2008 11:57 pm If you translate this, I'll include it in the mkv I made.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Jan 17, 2008 12:17 am I'm 20 min in now. For the translation, I'm using the butchered translation from the Russian by Joaquin, transcripts of the relevant episodes, what little bits of the official translation that we have (in the Pussan Camrips), and random notes and comments and such that have been made by various posters on the forum, while comparing it the actual Japanese track. I'm tweeking the timing a little here and there, but I'm not completely overhauling it. So far, some techno babble is being left unstranslated for a couple reasons. If anyone wants that translated, you are welcome to do that yourself, along with the timing. I'm not really proofing it too well either. There are punctuation mistakes, and probably spelling mistakes as well. If someone wnats those fixed, well, I'm posting the actual subtitle file when I'm done, so do it your self. Goddamn this is hard. I'm wicked suprised Speed sub groups get these things out as fast as they do. (I know, they have less checking and rechecking to do I'm sure.) Anyway, I'm getting it done as fast as I can but remember, I have a life, and my computer is old and twitchy. It can only take so much of this. Anyway, yeah... Dialogue: 0,0:19:21.70,0:19:23.49,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Have you decided on a name? Dialogue: 0,0:19:23.90,0:19:25.28,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,If it's a boy, Shinji. Dialogue: 0,0:19:25.90,0:19:27.48,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,If it's a girl, Rei. Dialogue: 0,0:19:27.89,0:19:28.86,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Shinji... Dialogue: 0,0:19:29.48,0:19:30.24,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Rei... Dialogue: 0,0:19:32.92,0:19:34.30,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Shinji... Dialogue: 0,0:19:34.92,0:19:36.09,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Shinji... Dialogue: 0,0:19:36.92,0:19:38.09,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Ayanami... Dialogue: 0,0:19:38.98,0:19:41.67,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Shinji... Rei... Dialogue: 0,0:19:42.91,0:19:43.67,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Rei... Dialogue: 0,0:19:44.70,0:19:45.67,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Ikari... Dialogue: 0,0:19:46.49,0:19:47.25,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Rei... Dialogue: 0,0:19:48.07,0:19:48.76,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,That's not right... Dialogue: 0,0:19:50.00,0:19:52.21,DefDialog,,0000,0000,0000,,Ayanami Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 17, 2008 8:15 pm @ cat42: The stuff with the Yui Train Scene thing goes like this: Yui: Have you decided on a name? Gendou: Shinji if it's a boy. Rei if it's a girl. That's what I'm thinking. Yui: Shinji. Rei. *She laughs* Shinji. Shinji. Ayanami Shinji. Rei. Rei. Ikari Rei. That's not right. Ayanami Rei. Some other stuff which might be off in some spots is here: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=92080#92080

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jan 17, 2008 8:31 pm You goofed there, though. She says "Dai ni no Shito" or "Second Angel" for Lilith, not the First Angel! Also- you couldn't have known this from the audio recording- Kwazzy-Eyed Rei turns up when Yui says "Ayanami...Rei".

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Jan 17, 2008 8:33 pm What's with this Misato line? "この世には弾を消費しとかないと困る人達もいるのよ" After they show all those guns and cannons firing at the "5"th Angel and Ritsuko's line about wasting taxes... New?
